content: I am Adebayo mubarak olasubomi, a 400 student studying Mathematics at fountain university . My enrolled courses are: my enrolled courses. My weekly study commitment is 27 hours. I prefer video, interactive, text, mixed content. Please generate my initial curriculum and first 5 study tasks.
